name: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
quote: This easing of sanctions alone by the United States could provide Russia with about $10 billion for the war. It spends the money from energy sales on weapons. We want peace — but peace that is just and lasting, not a surrender.

name: Vladimir Putin
quote: If Kyiv is not willing to resolve the matter peacefully, Russia will accomplish all the aims of the special military operation by military means. No Western military presence on Ukrainian soil will be tolerated.

name: Joe Biden
quote: We will not waver in our support for Ukraine. Ukraine can and will stop Putin. America stands with Ukraine.

name: Donald Trump
quote: Vladimir, STOP! 5000 soldiers a week are dying. Let's get the Peace Deal DONE! No more money, no more weapons, no more people. Let's make a deal.

name: Jens Stoltenberg
quote: Ukraine's future is in NATO. Supporting Ukraine is not charity, it is an investment in our own security. A world where might makes right is more dangerous for all of us.

name: Mark Rutte
quote: NATO can secure an additional $15 billion in 2026 to sustain Ukraine's military needs. European allies are stepping up — the responsibility for Patriot systems and advanced air defenses has shifted from Washington to us.

name: Ursula von der Leyen
quote: Russia must pay for its crimes. The frozen Russian assets are not ours — but as long as Russia wages its illegal war, they will be at work for Ukraine's reconstruction.

name: Sergei Lavrov
quote: The West has declared a 'total hybrid war' on Russia. The Coalition of the Willing and the Kyiv regime form a genuine 'axis of war.' Their proposals are dangerous and destructive.

name: Valery Gerasimov
role: Russian Chief of General Staff / Ukraine Commander
quote: The Russian Armed Forces are conducting an active defense and inflicting significant losses on the enemy in all directions of the special military operation.

name: Oleksandr Syrskyi
quote: Heavy fighting continues in the Pokrovsk, Kostiantynivka, and Lyman sectors. We recorded 187 combat engagements on March 19 alone. Russian daily losses have surged — our drone units are picking off hundreds of soldiers.

name: Valery Zaluzhnyi
role: Former Ukrainian Commander-in-Chief; now UK Ambassador
quote: We are at a stalemate. Without a technological leap — new technologies, new weapons — there is unlikely to be a breakthrough in the near future. The enemy has adapted.

name: Andriy Yermak
quote: Ukraine will never accept ultimatums. We negotiate from a position of principle, not desperation. Our sovereignty and territorial integrity are not bargaining chips.

name: Emmanuel Macron
quote: The US decision to ease Russia oil sanctions is in no way justified. Increasing economic pressure on Russia is decisive for it to accept serious negotiations for a just and lasting peace. France stands with Ukraine — unconditionally.

name: Olaf Scholz
quote: We will not participate in any actions that could lead to a direct confrontation between NATO and Russia. Germany supports Ukraine firmly but will not escalate to nuclear risk.

name: Friedrich Merz
quote: Germany was not notified of the US decision to ease Russia oil sanctions prior to its announcement. Europe must be able to defend itself. We will increase defense spending and support Ukraine for as long as necessary.

name: Rafael Grossi
quote: The situation at the Zaporizhzhia Nuclear Power Plant remains extremely precarious. I appeal to both sides to refrain from any military activity that could endanger nuclear safety.

name: António Guterres
quote: This war is killing and displacing people in huge numbers. It is causing massive destruction. It is creating alarming dangers for nuclear facilities. The exchange of prisoners of war and the return of civilian detainees must be part of any pathway to peace. It must end.

name: Yevgeny Prigozhin
quote: We are marching for justice! This is not a coup but a march of justice against incompetent military leadership. We will not let Russia be destroyed by mediocre generals.

name: Kim Jong Un
quote: The DPRK will always be with Russia. Our relations have reached a new high strategic level — an impregnable fortress of iron solidarity.

name: Rishi Sunak
quote: The UK stands unwaveringly with Ukraine. We were the first country to provide lethal aid, the first to provide long-range missiles, the first to pledge battle tanks. We will continue to lead.

name: Keir Starmer
quote: Britain's commitment to Ukraine is unconditional. The UK and France have signed a declaration of intent to deploy forces to Ukraine after any ceasefire — because Ukraine's fight is our fight.

name: Antony Blinken
quote: We will support Ukraine for as long as it takes. And Russia will face a strategic failure — it will never subjugate Ukraine, and its economy will be increasingly isolated.

name: Marco Rubio
quote: We support peace, not endless war. The goal is a sustainable ceasefire that prevents future escalation while protecting core interests. The US will remain engaged in European security.

name: Oleksii Reznikov
quote: Every HIMARS, every tank, every air defense system is not just a weapon — it is a life saved. Ukraine fights for values that the entire free world shares.

name: Rustem Umerov
quote: Ukraine needs partners to transform commitment into capability. Paper pledges must become real weapons at real frontlines. We are grateful for the support but more is urgently needed.

name: António Costa
quote: The US decision to ease Russia oil sanctions is very concerning, as it impacts European security. Increasing economic pressure on Russia is decisive for it to accept serious negotiations for a just and lasting peace. The EU is prepared to contribute to robust and credible security guarantees for Ukraine.

name: Scott Bessent
quote: The 30-day waiver on sanctioned Russian seaborne crude is aimed at stabilizing energy markets amid threats from Iran. It is a targeted, time-limited measure — not a reversal of our overall Russia sanctions posture.
